title: Pink Mixed Heart and Crown Balloon, Gold Large Crown Foil Balloons with Hot Light Pastel Pink Heart Shape Mylar Balloon Set for Girls Princess Queen Party Decoration Wedding Baby Shower
features: Princess Birthday Decoration: You will receive 1 pc of large crown balloons, 6 pcs pink heart balloons, ribbon and straw.These gold crown balloons and pink heart foil balloons will enhance your decor with a touch of elegance and romantic flair

Versatile Decorations: Our hot pink heart balloon and crown foil balloons are for princess themed birthday, queen party, graduation, mothers day, nurses day, baby shower, royalty, gender reveal, Valentine's Day, New Year, Christmas, Anniversary, Engagement. Easily pair them with balloon walls and other decorations for a stunning setup

Repeated Use: The foil balloons set contains a straw that can be used to deflate the gold crown mylar balloon and pink foil heart balloons, simply insert the straw into the valve and press gently until the gas is completely expelled. After use, it can be folded and stored for reuse

Quality Material: Crafted from robust foil, our baby pink heart foil ballons and crown balloons gold are designed to last. They are resist punctures, and can stay afloat for over 48 hours when filled, Just fill 90% of the balloon that could allow the balloon to expand completely

Easy to Use: Can be inflated with air or helium, Inflate the crown and pink heart shaped balloons with air pump. After filling, flatten the opening to seal automatically, ensuring long lasting decoration.Note: Do not overinflate to avoid popping
description: Make every moment shine with our crown balloon and heart balloons pink—perfect for any celebration! - Perfect for Any Occasion - Birthday Party – Create a dreamy and joyful ambiance with pink heart balloons - Wedding – Enhance your venue with a romantic atmosphere - Baby Shower or Gender Reveal – Soft pink tones ideal for welcoming a little one - Valentine’s Day or Anniversaries – Express your love with beautiful heart-shaped balloons - What’s Included? - 1 pc 27 in Large Crown Balloon – Adds a regal and luxurious feel - 2 pcs 18 inch Hot Pink Heart Balloons – Symbolizing love and passion - 2 pcs 18 in pink hearts balloons – Sweet and charming, perfect for delicate decorations - 2 pcs 18 inches Baby Pink Heart Balloons – Soft and dreamy for baby themed celebrations - 1 pc Roll of Ribbon – For securing and hanging your foil balloons with ease Features Quality Material – aluminum foil balloons that maintain their shape for longer Self-Sealing Design – No need to tie knots; the crown balloon and pink balloons heart seals itself after inflation Reusable & Eco-Friendly – Deflate carefully and store for future celebrations Safe & Non-Toxic – Made from premium, odor-free materials, perfect for home or party use Inflation Instructions - Inflation Options: Use helium for floating or an air pump/straw for ground decor - Prevent Bursting: Inflate 80-90% to avoid expansion from temperature changes - Self-Sealing: Balloons seal automatically; just remove the nozzle after inflating - Helium Tips: Fill hours before your event for longer float time; tie with ribbons - Storage: Keep uninflated balloons away from heat, sunlight, and sharp objects.
